name: kurenn
description: Claude Code plugins for Rails developers — Rails team simulation, audit, security workflows, and prompt refinement.

plugins.name: roundhouse
plugins.description: Rails specialist team for Claude Code. 7-34x cheaper than the comparable claude-on-rails v0.4 swarm across 10 representative tasks. Triages by tier; specialists on Sonnet, orchestrator on Opus.

plugins.name: boorails
plugins.description: Seven Rails-specific skills covering security, quality gates, implementation safety, root-cause diagnosis, framework operating mode, developer experience, and architectural alternatives. Script-first execution with explicit summaries.

plugins.name: rails-audit
plugins.description: Comprehensive Rails project stability audit across 18 dimensions — foundation, domain, specs, deploy/CI, security, money paths, code health, performance, reliability, observability, jobs, data integrity, governance, DX, cost. Read-only; produces a severity-ranked markdown report.

plugins.name: prompt-refiner
plugins.description: Translates casual application requests into detailed, step-by-step technical specifications that AI coding assistants can execute faithfully. Useful as a one-shot refinement at the top of any feature or build task.
